params_used.custom_text: // This module generates a clock division signal using a ripple counter. It takes a button input and a clock input, and operates under a reset control. When the reset signal is high, the ripple register is set to one. When the reset is low, the first bit of the ripple register reflects the button state, while subsequent bits are shifted in a chain, effectively passing the button input through four stages. The output clock division signal is generated by performing a logical OR operation on all bits of the ripple register, producing a high state only when any bit is high, thus serving as an inverted clock divider based on the button input.
